lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਬੁਝਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sabh sacho sach varatadaa jis bhaavai tisai bujhaae jeeo |20|
lines.english: The Truest of the True is pervading everywhere; He instructs those with whom He is pleased. ||20||
You Yourself created the Universe;
You created the play of duality, and staged it.
By His Grace, I have shed emotional attachment to Maya.
By Guru's Grace, I have found God.
You Yourself support the world.
You are the Gopis, the milk-maids of Krishna; You are the sacred river Jamunaa; You are Krishna, the herdsman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਆਪਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਸਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kar kai aapanee aape le samaae jeeo |21|
lines.english: Showering His Mercy, He has blended me into Himself. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਭਾਂਡੇ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਭੰਨਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: hukamee bhaandde saajiaa toon aape bhan savaar jeeo |22|
lines.english: By Your Command, human beings are fashioned. You Yourself embellish them, and then again destroy them. ||22||
Those who have focused their consciousness on the True Guru
have rid themselves of the love of duality.
I praise the Greatness of Your Goodness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀਆ ਓਇ ਚਲੇ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: niramal jot tin praaneea oe chale janam savaar jeeo |23|
lines.english: The light of those mortal beings is immaculate. They depart after redeeming their lives. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਣਮੰਗਿਆ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਵਣਾ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੨੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: anamangiaa daan devanaa kahu naanak sach samaal jeeo |24|1|
lines.english: You bestow Your Gifts, even if we do not ask for them. Says Nanak, contemplate the True Lord. ||24||1||
Forever and ever, night and day.
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:
I fall at His Feet to please and appease Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh milaaeaa tis jevadd avar na koe jeeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru has united me with the Lord, the Primal Being. There is no other as great as He. ||1||Pause||
He is sweeter than my mother or father.
The Lord of the Universe is my Sweet Beloved.
By Your Command, the month of Saawan has come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਣ ਭਾਈ ਸਭਿ ਸਜਣਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਹਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhain bhaaee sabh sajanaa tudh jehaa naahee koe jeeo |1|
lines.english: Among all sisters and brothers and friends, there is no one like You. ||1||
I have hooked up the plow of Truth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਬੀਜਣ ਲਗਾ ਆਸ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਹਲ ਬਖਸ ਜਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naau beejan lagaa aas kar har bohal bakhas jamaae jeeo |2|
lines.english: and I plant the seed of the Name in hopes that the Lord, in His Generosity, will bestow a bountiful harvest. ||2||
Meeting with the Guru, I recognize only the One Lord.
In my consciousness, I do not know of any other account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਤੈ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਇਓਨੁ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਂਵੈ ਨਿਬਾਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har ikatai kaarai laaeon jiau bhaavai tinvai nibaeh jeeo |3|
lines.english: The Lord has assigned one task to me; as it pleases Him, I perform it. ||3||
In the Guru's Court, He has blessed me with the Robe of Honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹੋਆ ਮਾਹਰੁ ਪਿੰਡ ਦਾ ਬੰਨਿ ਆਦੇ ਪੰਜਿ ਸਰੀਕ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: hau hoaa maahar pindd daa ban aade panj sareek jeeo |4|
lines.english: I have become the Master of my body-village; I have taken the five rivals as prisoners. ||4||
Enjoy yourselves and eat, O Siblings of Destiny.
I have come to Your Sanctuary.
The five farm-hands have become my tenants;
I meditate on You continually.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਨੁ ਕੋਈ ਕਢਿ ਨ ਹੰਘਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਵੁਠਾ ਘੁਘਿ ਗਿਰਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kan koee kadt na hanghee naanak vutthaa ghugh giraau jeeo |5|
lines.english: none dare to raise their heads against me. O Nanak, my village is populous and prosperous. ||5||
I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਜੜੁ ਥੇਹੁ ਵਸਾਇਓ ਹਉ ਤੁਧ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aujarr thehu vasaaeo hau tudh vittahu kurabaan jeeo |6|
lines.english: The village was in ruins, but You have re-populated it. I am a sacrifice to You. ||6||
O Beloved Lord, I meditate on You continually;
I have forsaken all my entanglements;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਲਾਹੀਅਨੁ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਭੁਖ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabhe kaaj savaarian laaheean man kee bhukh jeeo |7|
lines.english: All my affairs are arranged, and the hunger of my mind is appeased. ||7||
I obtain the fruits of my mind's desires.
I have obtained the comfort of comforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੈ ਪਲੈ ਬਧਾ ਛਿਕਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: nau nidh naam nidhaan har mai palai badhaa chhik jeeo |8|
lines.english: I have firmly attached the Name, the Home of the Nine Treasures to my robe. ||8||
I serve the True Lord of the Universe.
The Guru has implanted the Word of the Shabad deep within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਵਿਖਾਲਿਆ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧਰਿ ਕੈ ਹਥੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh vikhaaliaa masatak dhar kai hath jeeo |9|
lines.english: The True Guru has shown me my Husband Lord; He has placed His Hand upon my forehead. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਬਧੀ ਸਚੁ ਧਰਮ ਸਾਲ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: mai badhee sach dharam saal hai |
lines.english: I have established the Temple of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਰ ਧੋਵਾ ਪਖਾ ਫੇਰਦਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਲਗਾ ਪਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: pair dhovaa pakhaa feradaa tis niv niv lagaa paae jeeo |10|
lines.english: I wash their feet, and wave the fan over them. Bowing low, I fall at their feet. ||10||
I sought out the Guru's Sikhs, and brought them into it.
